title: tectaria hookeri
intro: Tectaria hookeri, also known as Hooker's fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions, and its rhizomes and leaves are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Tectaria hookeri include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Tectaria hookeri can be prepared as a tea or infusion by drying and steeping its rhizomes and leaves in hot water, and it is also used in herbal remedies to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
